meta.purpose: Repo-local PPT arrow asset pack sources for reusable structural and gradient presentation arrows.

sources.summary: Pick for a clean long rightward PPT arrow indicating overall direction, migration, or target-state movement. Skip for larger perspective main-chain arrows (use pptpack4_gradient_mainchain_01).
Pick for a compact rightward arrow between two blocks when the arrow should be visible but not dominate. Skip for full-width strategy paths (use pptpack_gradient_long_right_arrow).
Pick for bidirectional exchange, mutual influence, two-way data flow, or comparison between two sides. Skip for center-node bidirectional flow (use pptpack3_gradient_center_node_bidirectional_flow).
Pick for a three-step process chain with PPT-style gradient chevrons. Skip for four-stage processes (use pptpack_gradient_process_chevron_4_steps).
Pick for a four-step process chain with clean connected chevrons. Skip for a single long direction arrow (use pptpack_gradient_long_right_arrow).
Pick for a ribbon-like chevron arrow showing continuous progress or a streamlined path. Skip for separate labeled process steps (use pptpack_gradient_process_chevron_3_steps).
Pick for a clean upward PPT arrow indicating lift, growth, or promotion without 3D styling. Skip for broad upward lift (use pptpack3_gradient_wide_up_arrow).
Pick for a clean downward PPT arrow indicating deployment, drill-down, or top-down delivery. Skip for lane-based data flows (use data_flow_swimlanes).
Pick for two inputs converging into a rightward outcome, platform, or target. Skip for many streams into one platform (use converge_to_platform_arrow).
Pick for one path splitting into two rightward branches or differentiated choices. Skip for three or more downstream paths (use split_branch_arrows).
Pick for a horizontal baseline with a central upward lift, useful for main-path uplift or capability emergence. Skip for repeated foundation supports (use bottom_lift_arrow_row).
Pick for a low-profile bridge or roof arrow spanning multiple blocks in architecture diagrams. Skip for perspective main-chain emphasis (use pptpack4_gradient_mainchain_01).
Pick for a subtle arch bridge flow over a foundation or cross-layer connection. Skip for platform-up lift arrows (use pptpack3_gradient_platform_up_arrow).
Pick for rightward flow turning downward into delivery, implementation, or landing. Skip for pure downward emphasis (use pptpack_gradient_down_arrow).
Pick for rightward flow turning upward into escalation, uplift, or target capability. Skip for pure upward growth (use pptpack_gradient_up_arrow).
Pick for a long direction arrow with a chevron-cut tail, useful for technical roadmap or phased push visuals. Skip for plain long arrows (use pptpack_gradient_long_right_arrow).
